blurb: A tough Southwest native shrub that flowers white roses through the warm months and follows them with showy feathery pink seedhead plumes — drought-proof, deer-resistant, and built for hot, lean ground.
seasons: White rose-like flowers late spring–fall, then feathery pink seedhead plumes that persist; semi-evergreen fine foliage
wildlife: Native bees and butterflies; seeds and cover for birds
